subject: A Potion item — a blue-purple spray bottle with a pink Pokemon Center logo on its cap, rendered as a product illustration on a Pokemon Trainer card
description: The card is a Trainer-Item card showing a product illustration of the classic Pokemon Potion: a blue-purple spray bottle with a rounded white cap featuring the pink Pokemon Center cross logo. The bottle has a fine mist nozzle visible at the top. The composition is centered product-style on a plain background, with horizontal teal stripe design elements consistent with the Evolutions set's retro aesthetic. The card has no figure, creature scene, or landscape — it is purely object-and-product.
foreground: Spray bottle Potion item with Pokemon Center logo cap
background: Plain light background with teal stripe design elements
emotion: neutral product shot — no emotional register
